Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To Feb-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Continued To Feb-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Janet Brewer appeared via zoom for Ronnie Neiverth (Executor).
Dadi Gudmundsson appeared via zoom (objector).

Ms. Brewer stated that she will be filing a written objection, and that she cannot prove whether it is Trudi's handwriting or not. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Feb-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Brewer appeared by zoom for Ronni Neiverth (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the petitioner's position with respect to the decedent's intended codicil. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 1, 2010 is admitted to probate. Ronni Neiverth is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
